_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_25_note: Session 25 (2026-05-27): MRVL still in event_queue (earnings post-close TONIGHT May 27 — earnings not yet released at session time). ALAB processed as Phase 2 rotation session (next_deep_session). Key findings: (1) Marvell launched industry-first 260-lane PCIe 6.0 Switch for AI scale-up (March 2026) — first current, shipping competitor to ALAB's Scorpio X 320-lane; (2) MRVL CEO Matt Murphy keynoting Computex June 2 on 'The Future of AI Scaling Depends on Connectivity' — first head-to-head in-person showcase vs. ALAB; (3) TSMC April 2026 revenue $12.6B (+17.5% YoY), second-highest ever, YTD +29.9%; (4) Hyperscaler CapEx 2026 $690-725B confirmed; (5) Samsung union vote result due 10am KST today — not yet announced at session time. All prices flat (<1%). No DCF run. Phases 1b/1c gated (25%6=1). Next session (26): ABSOLUTE PRIORITY: MRVL Q1 FY2027 earnings — search results FIRST; update story_narrative in valuation/inputs/MRVL.json; run python3 valuation/dcf_model.py MRVL; update dashboard IV/MoS/Rec/Story/Last DCF; remove MRVL from event_queue. Also check Samsung union vote final result. Computex Jun 1-5 commentary will be live — check NVDA (Jensen keynote Jun 1), MRVL (Murphy keynote Jun 2), and ALAB (Scorpio X demo) developments.
